quotes: Test contrast levels (webaim.com or equivalent) for every text/background pair. [GENERAL minimums: WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold.]

rules.rule_text: Test contrast levels for every text/background pair to ensure compliance with WCAG AA standards, enforcing a minimum ratio of 4.5:1 for body text and 3:1 for large text (defined as 24px or larger, or 19px bold).

quotes: Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy. Avoid: Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

rules.rule_text: Known-safe contrast pairs include Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, and Graphite on White, Light Blue, or Golden Sand, as well as White text on Brand Blue, Deep Blue, or Dark Navy background. Sunshine and Gold text on White is strictly avoided to prevent contrast failure; golds are restricted to surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis.

quotes: Don't rely on color alone to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.

rules.rule_text: Do not rely on color alone to convey meaning or essential information. Always pair color cues with secondary visual feedback such as icons, depth, clear copy, or other visual elements.
